description: Initialize SQLite Database Schema (DDL) and Compound Indexes
steps: Create schema initialization script or migration class
Execute DDL for `task_session` table with im_route and parent_id indexes
Execute DDL for `chat_message` table with the critical `idx_chat_msg_seq` unique index
Execute DDL for `tool_execution_log` table with session and call_id indexes

description: Verify SQLite Schema constraints and indexes
steps: Run initialization script on an in-memory SQLite database
Attempt to insert duplicate sequence_num for the same session and stream_type, verify constraint failure
Verify all required fields throw errors when inserted as null
Validate index presence via SQLite pragmas

description: Define DbWriteEvent sealed interface and its concrete record implementations

description: Verify DbWriteEvent record immutability and instantiation

Assert that all fields match the inputs and are immutable

description: Implement SingleThreadDbWriter engine with LinkedBlockingQueue

Initialize internal LinkedBlockingQueue<DbWriteEvent>
Implement submitEvent(event) method for producer threads

Add placeholder SQL dispatch logic for each event type

description: Test concurrency and sequential processing of SingleThreadDbWriter
steps: Initialize SingleThreadDbWriter and start consumer thread
Spawn multiple virtual threads to concurrently submit various DbWriteEvents
Verify that the consumer thread processes events sequentially without race conditions
Verify the daemon thread handles thread interruption correctly

description: Implement Repository layer (TaskSession, ChatMessage, ToolExecution)

description: Test Repository read operations and write event delegation

Inject TaskManager, GlobalStreamManager, LocalStreamManager, ToolRegistry, and IMMessagePusher

Append resulting ToolResult to LocalStreamManager and transition state back to RUNNING

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块

Test suspendForApproval changes state to SUSPENDED and pushes a card message via Master route
Test resume(isApproved=true) calls executeWithBypass and appends success ToolResult
Test resume(isApproved=false) skips execution and appends forged error ToolResult
Verify state transitions back to RUNNING upon resume

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块

steps: Create PlanningTool class implementing AgentTool (specifically for Master use)
Hardcode the specialized prompt template for breaking down large tasks

Register this tool in ToolRegistry under the MASTER role

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块

steps: Mock LlmClient to return a formatted JSON string representing sub-tasks
Inject mocked client into PlanningTool
Call execute() on PlanningTool with a complex user requirement
Assert the output is a correctly parsed JSON array matching the execution_plan schema
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Implement WorkerRunner ReAct execution loop in run() method
steps: Check `isResumingFromSuspension`. If false, call `InjectionEngine` and append initial prompt.
Enter the `while(running)` ReAct loop.
Call `CircuitBreaker.checkAndIncrement()` at the start of each iteration.
Fetch context via `LocalStreamManager` and invoke `LlmClient.chat()`.
If response contains tool calls, iterate and execute via `ToolRegistry`.
Wrap tool execution in try-catch to specifically catch `SuspendExecutionException`.
If caught, call `SuspendResumeEngine.suspendForApproval()` and completely exit the thread (break loop).
If tools succeed, append `ToolResult` to local stream and continue loop.
When no more tool calls (task complete), call `CondensationEngine`, update Task status to COMPLETED, and exit.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Verify WorkerRunner ReAct loop, CircuitBreaker integration, and suspension exit
steps: Mock LlmClient to simulate a conversation that outputs a tool call, then a final text answer.
Verify that CircuitBreaker is incremented exactly as many times as the loop iterations.
Mock a tool execution to throw SuspendExecutionException.
Verify that SuspendResumeEngine is called and the worker thread naturally terminates without throwing unhandled exceptions.
Verify CondensationEngine is called upon successful completion.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Implement MasterRunner global orchestration loop in run() method
steps: Fetch global context via `GlobalStreamManager`.
Invoke LLM to clarify user intent. If unclear, push interactive question via `UICardRenderer` and yield.
Once clear, execute environment exploration using read-only tools.
Call `PlanningTool` explicitly to generate the `execution_plan` JSON array.
Iterate over the generated plan, calling `TaskManager.createWorkerTask` for each.
Trigger `WorkerRunner.run()` for each child task and strictly wait/monitor for their COMPLETED status.
Upon all workers completing, generate final summary via `UICardRenderer` and transition Master state to COMPLETED.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md

module: 状态机与调度引擎模块
description: Verify MasterRunner intent clarification, planning, and worker delegation
steps: Mock LlmClient to output clarification question, and verify UICardRenderer is triggered.
Mock PlanningTool to return a 2-item task array.
Verify that TaskManager creates exactly 2 Worker tasks.
Verify that the Master loops and successfully transitions its own state to COMPLETED only after workers finish.
Verify the final Summary Card is generated.
reference_docs: 状态机与调度引擎模块设计.md
